changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_execution_backend_span ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, trace_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL REFERENCES agent_execution_trace(trace_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, call_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE, parent_call_id VARCHAR(64), call_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, call_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, service_class VARCHAR(160), method_name VARCHAR(128), status VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL, sequence_no INTEGER NOT NULL, attempt_no INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, ended_at TIMESTAMPTZ, duration_ms BIGINT, input_json TEXT, output_json TEXT, error_json TEXT, related_span_id VARCHAR(64), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_execution_backend_span_trace_seq ON agent_execution_backend_span(trace_id, sequence_no, id); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_execution_backend_span_parent ON agent_execution_backend_span(parent_call_id); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_execution_backend_span_related ON agent_execution_backend_span(related_span_id);
